name: Lentil-Rice Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover lentils with water; bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer covered about 1-1 1/2 hours or until tender.
3. Drain liquid, reserving 1/4 cup.
4. In a large pot, heat 1/4 cup water and add onion, garlic, and celery.
5. Cook over medium-low heat until vegetables are tender, about 15 minutes.
6. Add tomatoes, drained lentils, reserved lentil water, cooked rice, and dill weed to the pot.
7. Mix well.
8. In a 3-quart casserole dish, sprinkle bread crumbs on the bottom.
9. Pour the lentil-rice mixture into the dish.
10. Sprinkle remaining bread crumbs over the top.
11. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
(Note: This can be made ahead of time and baked when cold; add 15 minutes to oven cooking time.)
